basic_details.job_title: NABFINS Regional Training Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The NABARD Financial Services (NABFINS) has officially released a recruitment notification for Regional Training Manager. For all details regarding the recruitment process, eligibility, and application procedure, refer to the official notification. Eligible candidates can download it from the link below.

age_limit.details: Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NABFINS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for NABFINS Regional Training Manager Recruitment 2026 is 16 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available under NABFINS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention the total number of vacancies for the Regional Training Manager post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for NABFINS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Graduate degree from a recognized university or institute.

faq.question: Q4. Is work experience mandatory for NABFINS Regional Training Manager?
faq.answer: Yes. Applicants should have a minimum of 5 years of relevant work experience, preferably in the Microfinance Industry.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for NABFINS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit is not specifically mentioned, but age relaxation will be applicable as per NABFINS rules.

faq.question: Q6. Where is the job location for NABFINS Regional Training Manager?
faq.answer: The position is based at the Kolkata Zonal Office of NABFINS.
